title: Scusi, lei è favorevole o contrario?
writer: Alberto Sordi, Sergio Amidei, Dario Argento
actors: Alberto Sordi, Anita Ekberg, Bibi Andersson
plot: Successful 50-year-old entrepreneur Tullio Conforti, opposed to divorce for religious reasons, is in fact separated from his wife and leads a frenetic life divided among numerous lovers.
